name.description: A comma-separated list of names or wildcard expressions

expand_wildcards.description: Whether wildcard expressions should get expanded to open or closed indices (default: open)

ignore_unavailable.description: Whether specified concrete indices should be ignored when unavailable (missing or closed)

allow_no_indices.description: Whether to allow (1) wildcard index expressions that match no indices and (2) requests where the final resolved set is empty.

mode.description: Filter indices by index mode. Comma-separated list of IndexMode. Empty means no filter.
